scope: Shared render-model wiring for GGM Canvas, draft preview, public route and RoomKey

tests.name: Production build
tests.notes: Existing Next multiple-lockfile workspace-root warning emitted.

tests.name: Frontend focused unit and contract tests
tests.command: node --test --experimental-strip-types lib/presence/render/resolver.test.ts lib/presence/widgets/registry.test.ts lib/presence/option-packs/registry.test.ts lib/presence/typography/registry.test.ts lib/editor/canvasModel.test.ts lib/editor/canvasMutations.test.ts lib/editor/assetValidator.test.ts lib/editor/diffEngine.test.ts lib/api/editor.test.ts lib/api/presenceGraph.test.ts
tests.notes: Node reports existing module-type reparsing warnings for TypeScript tests.

tests.name: Backend editor, graph and RoomKey/public boundary tests
tests.notes: Existing SQLAlchemy Query.get legacy warnings emitted.

tests.name: Canvas, Studio, RoomKey and public-route end-to-end flows
tests.command: npx.cmd playwright test tests/e2e/canvas-builder-parity.spec.ts tests/e2e/presence-canvas-direct-manipulation.spec.ts tests/e2e/presence-studio-editor.spec.ts tests/e2e/presence-pass-paths.spec.ts --workers=1
